learn.body: 9 EASA topics in plain language. Lessons in Latvian, English, and Russian.

practice.title: Practice
practice.body: Answer real-style questions. Take mock exams until you consistently score 80%+.

pass.title: Get certified
pass.body: Take the official A1/A3 exam at e.caa.gov.lv — you are fully prepared. The exam itself is free at the CAA portal.

localFirst.title: Latvian-first
localFirst.body: Built for the Latvian process — registration at e.caa.gov.lv, A1/A3 exam, real CAA wording.

passOrFree.title: One-time, no subscription
passOrFree.body: €19 once. No monthly fees, no renewals, no upsells. Full access is yours to keep.

euAligned.title: EU regulation aligned
euAligned.body: Content cites the actual rules — Reg (EU) 2019/947 and EASA Easy Access Rules — not generic drone trivia.

facts.heading: What the official exam looks like
facts.validity: Certificate valid 5 years, recognised across the EU
